title: Lebanon urges US to pressure Israel — Aoun/Salam meet ambassador Issa, 3rd Washington talks Thu-Fri
snippet: Lebanese President Joseph Aoun and PM Nawaf Salam met separately with US ambassador Michel Issa to prepare for the 3rd meeting between Lebanese and Israeli representatives in Washington on Thursday-Friday (May 14-15). PM Salam asked Issa to 'exert pressure on Israel to stop the ongoing attacks and violations, in order to consolidate the ceasefire.'
tag_reason: New diplomatic development — May 11 meetings between Lebanese leadership and US ambassador, new detail on 3rd Washington talks dates (Thu-Fri May 14-15)
